TestCase.name: testQ28

NULL, CAST(+(90, 10)):DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL)), AND(>=(CAST($19):DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL, 2323.00), <=(CAST($19):DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL, CAST(+(2323, 1000)):DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL)), AND(>=(CAST($11):DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL, 31.00), <=(CAST($11):DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL, CAST(+(31, 20)):DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL)))))]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[STORE_SALES]])

TestCase.name: testQ9
TestCase.Resource: LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$0=[AVG($1)]) LogicalProject(SS_EXT_SALES_PRICE=[$15], SS_NET_PAID=[$20]) LogicalFilter(condition=[SEARCH($10, Sarg[[1..20]])]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[STORE_SALES]])
